theme_and_archetype.archetype: High-Contrast & Editorial (Dark Mode with Vibrant Accents)
theme_and_archetype.mood: Energetic, professional yet creative, bold, and highly personal
theme_and_archetype.description: A dark-themed portfolio mimicking an editorial scrapbook or interactive wireframe. Relies on stark contrasts, a blazing bright orange primary color against deep black, and a mix of heavy brutalist sans-serif fonts with playful handwritten script accents. The design embraces asymmetry, floating doodle elements, and rich layered components.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-secondary

typography.instructions: Use 'Outfit' for all heavy structural text. Use 'Caveat' specifically for accent words (like 'Arya' in the hero heading, and 'Building Digital Experiences'). Never use Inter for headings.

spacing_and_layout.surface_treatment: Use crisp 1px borders (border-white/10) with dark backgrounds. Do not overuse heavy gradients; rely on flat colors, subtle noise/textures, and precise alignment.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons lift (-translate-y-1) with a subtle primary shadow. Text links get an underline expansion.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_reveal: Fade up with slight vertical translation. Elements in grids should stagger.
motion_and_interactions.floating_doodles: Use Framer Motion to give background doodles (wireframe icons, shapes) a slow, continuous floating animation (y: [-5, 5] over 3 seconds).

navigation.style: Sticky top bar, z-50. Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10.
navigation.layout: Left: 'AC' Monogram Logo (A in white, C in orange). Center: Desktop links (Home, About, Services, Projects, Contact). Right: 'LET'S CONNECT' pill button (bg-primary text-black font-bold rounded-full).
navigation.mobile: Hamburger menu mapping to a fullscreen dark overlay.

hero_section.layout: Two columns. Left: Typography and action. Right: Portrait image and doodles.

left_column.heading: Text 'Hey, I'm ' followed by 'Arya' in Caveat font (orange text with a swoosh/underline), then ' Chakraborty'.
left_column.role_chips: Flex row of chips: [Developer], [Marketer], [Problem Solver]. Dark pills, border-white/10, orange Lucide icons (Code, Megaphone, Lightbulb).
left_column.stats_card: A dark bento box (bg-surface) listing Age, City, Skills, Education. Grid layout inside the card.
left_column.ctas: Primary: 'View My Work' (Orange pill). Secondary: 'Download Resume' (Outline pill).

right_column.visual: Arya's Hackathon photo isolated/layered over a massive circular orange glow (bg-[#FF6B1A] blur-[120px] absolute z-0).
right_column.decorations: Absolute positioned wireframe/cursor SVG icons on the right side. Handwritten 'Building Digital Experiences' text overlaid.

pass_card.content: Vertical ID card style. Top: 'PASS CARD'. Photo: Arya's Denim Jacket photo (grayscale or high contrast). Fields below: NAME, AGE, CITY, GENDER, SKILLS, CURRENTLY (in crisp black uppercase text, highly structured).
pass_card.surroundings: Rotated text labels (bg-surface border border-white/10 text-white text-sm) positioned absolutely around the card. Labels: AI Enthusiast, Disciplined, Wireframing, Collaborative, Coffee Addict, Gym. Add dotted/dashed SVG connector lines tying labels to the pass card. Include doodle icons (Dumbbell, Laptop, Coffee, PenTool).

services_section.cards: Dark surfaces (bg-surface), border-white/10, top-left orange icon, heading, short description. Services: Full Stack Web Dev, SEO, Digital Marketing, Data Analytics, AI & Automation, UI/UX Design.

projects_section.layout: Stack or Grid of 3 featured projects.
projects_section.cards: Image thumbnail at top, content below. Title, short description, tech stack tags (small pills). Projects: CitiFix, EduVerse, School ERP.

skills_and_achievements.skills_cloud: Marquee or flex-wrap cloud of pill shapes. (React.js, JavaScript, Vite, HTML, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, Digital Marketing, Team Management, SEO/AEO/GEO, GMB Optimisation).
skills_and_achievements.achievements: A solid dark strip or marquee: National Hackathon Winner | 5x Finalist | IIT KGP Campus Ambassador | IIT Madras Shaastra Intern.

contact_and_footer.contact_form: Left: 'Let's Build Something' text. Right: Form (Name, Email, Subject, Message). Submit button triggers WhatsApp redirect: window.open('https://wa.me/9073568772?text=' + encodedMessage).
contact_and_footer.footer: Simple dark footer. Social links (LinkedIn, Instagram, GitHub, Email). Copyright text.

ai_chatbot.trigger: Floating circular button (orange) with MessageCircle icon.
ai_chatbot.panel: Dark chat panel popping up. Header 'Ask about Arya'. Input area and message display.

about_portrait.description: Arya in denim jacket and sunglasses

project_school_erp.description: Captivating orange spirals (Placeholder for School ERP)

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for all standard UI icons (menus, arrows, social). For the doodle/sticker elements, if lucide doesn't have a perfectly whimsical fit, standard SVG paths or heavily stroked lucide icons (strokeWidth={2.5}) can work to mimic wireframes.

testing.rules: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute. Format: kebab-case, role-based. e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='contact-submit-button'.
